raw_consumer_statement:
I was the victim of a carefully orchestrated scam in which, through deception, emotional manipulation, and intimidation, I was made to carry out multiple credit card payments for a supposed product that never existed. The person acting as an intermediary made me believe this was a legitimate purchase but later admitted to using the money for personal purposes without my knowledge or consent. 

I was fully deceived, manipulated, and intimidated. This individual abused my trust, using personal and psychological tactics to pressure me into making the payments. I was drawn into a web of lies and false promises designed to fraudulently and maliciously extract money from me. 

Not only did I never receive any product, service, or refund, but I have also suffered serious emotional, financial, and even physical harm as a direct result of this situation. I feel deeply affected and violated. 

I am requesting a full investigation of the case, the reversal of the transactions involved, and a full refund of my money. This was a clear, deliberate, and extremely harmful fraud, and I have documented evidence to support my claim
